title: Sarah Amendola | BAL Immigration Law
content:
Sarah is an Associate in BAL’s Tysons office. She provides guidance to clients’ foreign national employees on their U.S. immigration journeys, handling both immigrant and nonimmigrant case types. Sarah has extensive experience advising multinational corporations in various sectors on their U.S. immigration sponsorship and mobility programs. Throughout her career, she has worked in various aspects of immigration, including I-9 compliance, consular affairs, humanitarian, as well as investment and entrepreneurship-based visas.
The Catholic University of America Columbus School of Law, J.D., Certificate in Comparative and International Law, cum laude Fordham University, B.A., International Political Economy and Classical Civilizations
District of Columbia
